design_philosophy.visual_style: Swiss Minimalist, High Contrast (Red/White/Black), Clean Lines

usage.feature_card: bg-white border border-slate-100 hover:border-[#E30613]/20 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all

layout.grid_system: Use 'Bento Grid' for features: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6

containers.card: rounded-2xl p-8 h-full flex flex-col justify-between

buttons.style: rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold text-lg transition-transform active:scale-95

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300

navigation.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-100

visual_enhancers.gradients: No large gradients. Use subtle red glow spots: 'bg-red-500/10 blur-3xl rounded-full'

images.description: Abstract red security shield elements for background atmosphere
Happy user with mobile phone for social proof section

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5, size 24 or 32. Color: #E30613 for active, #000000 for standard.

universal_guidelines: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.
Do NOT use pure #000000 for text, use #0A0A0A or #171717.
Do NOT use gradients on text.
Buttons must have a clear focus ring.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup global CSS with Chivo and Inter fonts.
2. Configure Tailwind colors to match the palette.
3. Build the 'Hero' section with a split layout (Text Left, Graphic Right).
4. Build the 'Features' section using a Bento Grid layout.
5. Build the 'How It Works' section as a vertical step list.
6. Ensure the Footer is clean and corporate.
7. Use the provided image URLs for specific sections.
